testcase.name: @AfterMethod tearDown
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.WebDriverException: Timed out waiting for driver server to stop. Build info: version: '4.44.0', revision: 'da2039b' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.10' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [0e3f2b3962b521362e1128f5574dcd01, quit {}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 148.0.7778.179, chrome: networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:59281/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 148.0.7778.179, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} at completed, task = java.util.concurrent.Executors$RunnableAdapter@2feef2d2[Wrapped task = org.openqa.selenium.remote.http.jdk.JdkHttpClient$$Lambda/0x000002c3d8206240@2bd173f7]] rejected from testcase.name: NumberUpdate
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//div[@class='view-profile-wrapper']/a"} (Session info: testcase.name: ProfileValidate
